title: Non GATE CSE_ Others - UGC NET CSE  June 2009  Part 2  Question

sections.name: UGC NET CSE  June 2009  Part 2  Question

questions.question:
Which of the following changes permission to deny write permission to group and others ?

  1. Chmod go-w filex               
  2. Chmod go w filex    
  3. Chmod go=w filex              
  4. None of the above


UGC NET CSE | June 2009 | Part 2 | Question: 37

Read the following and Answer the Questions:
Consider the relational schema of sailors \( \text{S} \). Reserves \( \mathrm{R} \) and Boots \( \text{B} \).

Table \( 1 \): Sailors \( \text{S} \)
\begin{array}{|l|l|l|}
\hline Sid & Sname & Ratting & Age \\
\hline 22 & Dustin & 7 & 45.0 \\
29 & Brutus & 1 & 33.0 \\
31 & Lubber & 8 & 55.5 \\
32 & Andy & 8 & 25.5 \\
58 & Rusty & 10 & 35.0 \\
64 & Horatio & 7 & 35.0 \\
71 & Zorba & 10 & 16.0 \\
74 & Horatio & 9 & 35.0 \\
85 & Art & 3 & 25.5 \\
95 & Bob & 3 & 63.5 \\
\hline
\end{array}


Table \( 2 \): Reserves \( \text{R} \)

\begin{array}{|l|l|l|}
\hline sid & Bid & day \\
\hline 22 & 101 & 10 / 1098 \\
22 & 108 & 101098 \\
22 & 108 & 101898 \\
22 & 104 & 10 / 798 \\
31 & 108 & 11 / 1098 \\
31 & 103 & 11 / 699 \\
31 & 104 & 11 / 298 \\
64 & 101 & 9558 \\
64 & 102 & 28858 \\
74 & 103 & 98958 \\
\hline
\end{array}


Table \( 3 \): Boats \( \text{B} \)

\begin{array}{|l|l|l|}
\hline Bid & Bname & Color \\
\hline 101 & Interlake & blue \\
102 & Interlake & red \\
103 & Clipper & green \\
104 & Marine & red \\
\hline
\end{array}

Which of the following relational algebra query/queries computes/compute the name of sailors who have reserved red boat?

\( \text{Q1} \) \( \pi \) sname (( \( \delta \)\( _{color} \) = \( _{red} \) Boats) \( \bowtie \) Reserves \( \bowtie \) Sailors)

\( \text{Q2} \) \( \pi \) sname (\( \pi \) \( _{ bid} \) (( \( \pi \) \( _{ bid} \) \( \delta \)\( _{color} \) = \( _{red} Boats \)) \( \bowtie \) Reserves) \( \bowtie \) Sailors)

\( \text{Q3} \) \( \pi \) sname  (( \( \delta \)\( _{ color} \) = \( _{red} \) Reserves) Boats \( \bowtie \) Sailors)

  1. Both \( \text{Q1} \) and \( \text{Q3} \)
  2. Both \( \text{Q2} \) and \( \text{Q3} \)
  3. Only \( \text{Q1} \)
  4. Only \( \text{Q2} \)


 



UGC NET CSE | October 2022 | Part 1 | Question: 97
